pages.text:
ENRISA la 17 7/8 . LS

EMBASSY OF THE REPUBLIC OF SIERRA LEONE

AND MISSION TO THE EUROPEAN COMMUNITIES

ur. re our. re

The Embassy of the Republic of Sierra Leone presents its compliments to the

Ministry of Foreign Affairs and has the honour to inform that the Government of the Republic of Sierra Leone accedes to the Convention Relating to International

Exhibitions signed at Paris on November 22"d, 1928 and Supplemented by the

Protocols of May 10"h, 1948, November 16", 1966, November 30", 1972 and the

Amendments 24 June 1982 and the Amendment of May 31", 1988

The Instrument of Accession of the Republic of Sierra Leone signed by the

Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation is attached herewith.

The Embassy of Republic of Sierra Leone avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs the assurances of its highest consideration.

Brussels, 20

Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Direction for United Nations &

International Organisations

PARIS

Avenue de Tervueren, 410 - B-1150 Brussels

Tel. +32 (0)2 771 00 53 - Fax +32 (0)2 771 82 30

E-mail: sierraleoneembassy@brutele.be

Ministry of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation of the Republic of Sierra Leone

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

1, 1928 and supplemented

, 1988 and undertakes faithfully to abide by the provisions contained

THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF SIERRA LEONE

having considered the said Convention hereby accedes to the same and undertakes faithfully to carry out all stipulation therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, ZAINAB HAWA BANGURA, Minister f Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation of the Republic of Sierr say or March pointo set my hand and affixed my seal, this Twentiet

In Witness thereof, I have Sign this Instrument of Accession at.....

.......On.....r......

ZAINAB HAWA BANGURA (MRS.)

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND

INTERNATIONAL COOPERATION
